name: EVMFS Protocol Handler
description: Resolve evmfs:// protocol URLs from on-chain EVM storage

content_security_policy.sandbox: sandbox allow-scripts allow-forms allow-popups allow-modals; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' blob: data:; child-src 'self' blob: data:; img-src * blob: data:; style-src * 'unsafe-inline' blob: data:; font-src * blob: data:; media-src * blob: data:; connect-src * blob: data:;
